name: Rosetta Fieldwork
capability_claim: Few-shot induction of a novel morphophonological system and compositional generalization from a small parallel corpus: morpheme segmentation, affix function identification, boundary phonology (vowel harmony, hiatus deletion, nasal assimilation), irregular-form detection, word-order inference, and exact compositional production.
task: Each item is an independent procedurally generated constructed mini-language. Given a parallel corpus of 16-32 sentence pairs (conlang <-> English) and one novel English query sentence, produce the conlang translation of the query.

easy.notes: no phonological rules; all query wordforms attested verbatim; requires lexicon mapping plus word order

medium.notes: vowel harmony and/or hiatus deletion; inflected query wordforms attested only by analogy; occasional irregular plurals

hard.notes: harmony + hiatus + nasal assimilation, subject agreement, negation (prefix or suffix), zero present marking, irregular and decoy-irregular forms, larger corpora with distractor lexemes

answer_contract.format: lowercase words separated by single spaces, no punctuation, no hyphens
answer_contract.normalization: lowercase; hyphens removed; all other non-letter characters treated as separators; whitespace collapsed

scoring.method: deterministic exact match per item after normalization
scoring.partial_credit: none within an item; difficulty gradient across items provides score spread; token-F1 reported as a non-scoring diagnostic

generation.deterministic: byte-identical regeneration for a fixed seed
generation.fresh_items: unbounded; any seed yields a new disjoint item set

identifiability_contract: every gold wordform is attested verbatim or forced by an attested analogy (same affix chain on a stem of the same harmony class and same boundary-relevant final/initial segment shape)
every affix used by the answer is attested >=3 times across >=2 distinct stems
every content lexeme of the query appears in >=2 corpus sentences
irregular forms needed by the answer are attested verbatim
stem-final segments that matter for the answer are exposed somewhere in the corpus
clause word order attested >=3 times; negation attested >=2 times when needed
the query sentence and the gold sentence never appear in the corpus
external_solvability: All evidence needed to determine each answer is contained in the item's own corpus in the public solver bundle; the solver packet states the closed inventory of possible phenomena and a worked example. A Linguistics-Olympiad-capable human or model can derive every answer in principle. Machine-checked by verifier.py.
non_duplication: Unlike Olympiad-derived sets, items are procedurally generated (no leakage, unbounded fresh items), graded by deterministic exact match in the generation direction, and ship a per-item machine-checked identifiability guarantee. Not a re-skin of document-reconciliation forensics benchmarks: no policies, ledgers, or arithmetic.
